confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_e7112f00-64cd-4d5b-a476-005f472ec2e3 read back as received

evidence: Failure: activation_failed: SetForegroundWindow returned False and foreground HWND is 0
The review result was already committed and pushed, but direct OSM did not deliver to Bob.
proposed_direction: OSM send should enqueue a delivery promise before attempting focus-sensitive delivery.
If target surface is not visible or activatable, the queue should retry after visibility/workspace changes or route to the target identity inbox with explicit failed-delivery evidence.
Caller should receive a small status object: accepted_for_delivery, delivered, deferred, or failed_with_fallback, without dumping huge evidence payloads.
payload.summary: After closing narada-andrey task 75, Kevin attempted to OSM Bob the review result. Delivery failed with activation_failed because SetForegroundWindow returned False and foreground HWND was 0. This confirms direct clipboard/sendkeys delivery is still too synchronous and desktop/visibility fragile.
payload.title: Operator-surface message delivery needs durable queue fallback when activation fails
